updateNote: Day 55 12:02 PM PT refresh: Trump on Truth Social ordered US Navy to 'shoot and kill' any Iranian boat laying mines in Hormuz — 'Sealed up Tight, until Iran is able to make a DEAL!!!' Pentagon: mine-clearing could take 6 months. USS George H.W. Bush entered CENTCOM AOR as 3rd US carrier in theater (Indian Ocean) — transited Cape of Good Hope to avoid Houthis. Navy Sec John Phelan ousted by Hegseth amid shipbuilding dispute. Tehran air defenses engaged 'hostile targets' (Mehr News). Pope Leo XIV called for US-Iran peace talks aboard plane from Africa: 'I cannot be in favor of war.' 2nd French UNIFIL peacekeeper Cpl. Anicet Girardin (31) died of wounds from April 18 ambush. Senate defeated Baldwin war powers 46-51 (5th failure). Israeli strike on Beit Lahia killed 5 (3 children). Houthis threatened Bab el-Mandeb closure. Brent $103.38 (+29.5%), WTI $94.46 (+25.1%). Gas $4.03 (-6¢ wk).
